channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: sindresorhus /awesome | N/A | N/A
item.description: 😎 Awesome lists about all kinds of interesting topics

item.title: alibaba /zvec | C++ | N/A
item.description: A lightweight, lightning-fast, in-process vector database

item.title: steipete /CodexBar | Swift | N/A
item.description: Show usage stats for OpenAI Codex and Claude Code, without having to login.

item.title: firecrawl /firecrawl | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: The API to search, scrape, and interact with the web at scale. 🔥

item.title: karakeep-app /karakeep | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: A self-hostable bookmark-everything app (links, notes and images) with AI-based automatic tagging and full text search

item.title: bradautomates /claude-video | Python | N/A
item.description: Give Claude the ability to watch any video. /watch downloads, extracts frames, transcribes, hands it all to Claude.

item.title: ogulcancelik /herdr | Rust | N/A
item.description: agent multiplexer that lives in your terminal.

item.title: mvanhorn /last30days-skill | Python | N/A
item.description: AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary

item.title: openai /codex-plugin-cc | JavaScript | N/A
item.description: Use Codex from Claude Code to review code or delegate tasks.

item.title: alirezarezvani /claude-skills | Python | N/A
item.description: 345 Claude Code skills & agent skills & plugins (30+ Agents, 70+ custom commands, 330+ skills, customizable references, scripts)for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and 8 more coding agents — engineering, marketing, product, compliance, C-level advisory, research, business operations, commercial & finance, and your daily productivity skills.

item.title: Leonxlnx /taste-skill | JavaScript | N/A
item.description: Taste-Skill - gives your AI good taste. stops the AI from generating boring, generic slop

item.title: ruvnet /RuView | Rust | N/A
item.description: π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.

item.title: Zackriya-Solutions /meetily | Rust | N/A
item.description: Privacy first, AI meeting assistant with 4x faster Parakeet/Whisper live transcription, speaker diarization, and Ollama summarization built on Rust. 100% local processing. no cloud required. Meetily (Meetly Ai -https://meetily.ai) is the #1 Self-hosted, Open-source Ai meeting note taker for macOS & Windows.

item.title: addyosmani /agent-skills | JavaScript | N/A
item.description: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents.

item.title: asgeirtj /system_prompts_leaks | JavaScript | N/A
item.description: Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking, GPT 5.5 Instant, Codex. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.
